description: CompositionGrey polo T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a ribbed collar, green and yellow stripes across the chest to the short sleeves, buttoned chest placket and embroidered logo on left chestFitComfortWash careGentle machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, dry clean, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsIf you love to stay dry, fresh and comfortable, there's no better way than with this red polo T-shirt from adidas. Designed for the fashion conscious, this polo tee fits neatly along the contours of your body, providing you with a perfect fit. Wear it to the gym or the Sports club, or simply pair it with jeans and casual footwear for that cool look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
